    56→      const pkgName =
    57→        id[0] === '@'
    58→          ? id.slice(0, id.indexOf('/', slashIdx + 1))
    59→          : id.slice(0, slashIdx)

    61→    }
    62→    return false
    63→  }

    67→    ...(esbuild && { esbuild }),
    68→    build: {

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Good, `@floating-ui/react-dom` was already installed in the workspace. Now let me also check if there's a `PortalThemeWrapper` concern - when we portal to `document.body`, the theme wrapper needs to properly wrap the content. Let me also think about whether `refs.setReference` being called inside the render function is correct.

Actually, there's an issue with calling `refs.setReference` inside the render callback. This is a side effect inside a render function which is not ideal. Let me think about the right approach.

The `menuRenderFn` callback from Lexical's `LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin` gives us an `anchorElementRef` which is a React ref object that points to a DOM element positioned at the cursor. 

Since the anchor element can shift as the cursor moves, I need to sync it with `refs.setReference` from `useFloating`. The challenge is that `anchorElementRef` is a ref, so changes to it don't trigger effects directly. But looking at Lexical's behavior, the `menuRenderFn` gets called during render whenever the menu should display, and the anchor element stays consistent for the duration of that menu session.

Calling `refs.setReference` during render is actually fine since it's just a ref update, not a state change. React's strict mode shouldn't cause issues here. The floating-ui library handles the case where `refs.setReference` gets called before `refs.setFloating` is set up—it waits until both elements are available before computing the position. Now I'm thinking through how `autoUpdate` fits into this...

The `whileElementsMounted` option should handle the lifecycle correctly, starting auto-updates once both elements mount and stopping when either unmounts. But I'm realizing that calling `refs.setReference` inside the render callback could potentially trigger a re-render loop since it's happening during React's render phase. I should restructure this with a separate component to handle the floating positioning logic instead.
</details></think>

```tsx
import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import {
  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
import {
  autoUpdate,
  flip,
  offset,
  shift,
  useFloating,
} from '@floating-ui/react-dom'
import type { LexicalEditor, TextNode } from 'lexical'
import { $getSelection, $isRangeSelection } from 'lexical'
import type { MutableRefObject, ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'

import { getBuiltinItems } from './builtinItems'
import type { SlashMenuItem } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuItem as SlashMenuItemClass } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuList } from './SlashMenuList'

export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {
  items?: SlashMenuItem[]
  extraItems?: SlashMenuItem[]
  triggerChar?: string
}

interface SlashMenuItemConfig {
  title: string
  icon?: ReactNode
  description?: string
  keywords?: string[]
  section?: string
  onSelect: (editor: LexicalEditor, queryString: string) => void
}

export function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    if (configs) {
      for (const config of configs) {
        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
      }
    }
  }
  return items
}

function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
  if (!query) return items
  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
  return items.filter((item) => {
    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
  })
}

function FloatingSlashMenu({
  anchorElementRef,
  children,
}: {
  anchorElementRef: MutableRefObject<HTMLElement | null>
  children: ReactNode
}) {
  const { refs, floatingStyles } = useFloating({
    placement: 'bottom-start',
    middleware: [offset(4), flip({ padding: 8 }), shift({ padding: 8 })],
    whileElementsMounted: autoUpdate,
  })

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    refs.setReference(anchorElementRef.current)
  }, [anchorElementRef, refs])

  return createPortal(
    <PortalThemeWrapper>
      <div ref={refs.setFloating} style={floatingStyles}>
        {children}
      </div>
    </PortalThemeWrapper>,
    document.body,
  )
}

export function SlashMenuPlugin({
  items,
  extraItems,
  triggerChar = '/',
}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)

  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    if (items) return items
    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
  }, [items, extraItems, editor])

  const filteredItems = useMemo(
    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
    [queryString, allItems],
  )

  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
    minLength: 0,
  })

  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    (
      option: SlashMenuItem,
      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
      closeMenu: () => void,
      matchingString: string,
    ) => {
      editor.update(() => {
        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
          const selection = $getSelection()
          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
          }
        }
      })
      closeMenu()
      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
    },
    [editor],
  )

  return (
    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
      options={filteredItems}
      menuRenderFn={(
        anchorElementRef,
        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
      ) => {
        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
          return null
        }
        return (
          <FloatingSlashMenu anchorElementRef={anchorElementRef}>
            <SlashMenuList
              options={filteredItems}
              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
            />
          </FloatingSlashMenu>
        )
      }}
    />
  )
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-plugin-slash-menu/src/SlashMenuPlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     3→import {
     4→  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
     5→  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
     6→} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
     7→import {
     8→  autoUpdate,
     9→  flip,
    10→  offset,
    11→  shift,
    12→  useFloating,
    13→} from '@floating-ui/react-dom'
    14→import type { LexicalEditor, TextNode } from 'lexical'
    15→import { $getSelection, $isRangeSelection } from 'lexical'
    16→import type { MutableRefObject, ReactNode } from 'react'
    17→import { useCallback, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    18→import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    19→
    20→import { getBuiltinItems } from './builtinItems'
    21→import type { SlashMenuItem } from './SlashMenuItem'
    22→import { SlashMenuItem as SlashMenuItemClass } from './SlashMenuItem'
    23→import { SlashMenuList } from './SlashMenuList'
    24→
    25→export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {
    26→  items?: SlashMenuItem[]
    27→  extraItems?: SlashMenuItem[]
    28→  triggerChar?: string
    29→}
    30→
    31→interface SlashMenuItemConfig {
    32→  title: string
    33→  icon?: ReactNode
    34→  description?: string
    35→  keywords?: string[]
    36→  section?: string
    37→  onSelect: (editor: LexicalEditor, queryString: string) => void
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
    41→  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
    42→  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
    43→  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    44→    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    45→    if (configs) {
    46→      for (const config of configs) {
    47→        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
    48→      }
    49→    }
    50→  }
    51→  return items
    52→}
    53→
    54→function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
    55→  if (!query) return items
    56→  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
    57→  return items.filter((item) => {
    58→    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    59→    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
    60→  })
    61→}
    62→
    63→function FloatingSlashMenu({
    64→  anchorElementRef,
    65→  children,
    66→}: {
    67→  anchorElementRef: MutableRefObject<HTMLElement | null>
    68→  children: ReactNode
    69→}) {
    70→  const { refs, floatingStyles } = useFloating({
    71→    placement: 'bottom-start',
    72→    middleware: [offset(4), flip({ padding: 8 }), shift({ padding: 8 })],
    73→    whileElementsMounted: autoUpdate,
    74→  })
    75→
    76→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    77→    refs.setReference(anchorElementRef.current)
    78→  }, [anchorElementRef, refs])
    79→
    80→  return createPortal(
    81→    <PortalThemeWrapper>
    82→      <div ref={refs.setFloating} style={floatingStyles}>
    83→        {children}
    84→      </div>
    85→    </PortalThemeWrapper>,
    86→    document.body,
    87→  )
    88→}
    89→
    90→export function SlashMenuPlugin({
    91→  items,
    92→  extraItems,
    93→  triggerChar = '/',
    94→}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
    95→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    96→  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)
    97→
    98→  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    99→    if (items) return items
   100→    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
   101→    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
   102→    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
   103→    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
   104→  }, [items, extraItems, editor])
   105→
   106→  const filteredItems = useMemo(
   107→    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
   108→    [queryString, allItems],
   109→  )
   110→
   111→  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
   112→    minLength: 0,
   113→  })
   114→
   115→  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
   116→    (
   117→      option: SlashMenuItem,
   118→      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
   119→      closeMenu: () => void,
   120→      matchingString: string,
   121→    ) => {
   122→      editor.update(() => {
   123→        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
   124→          const selection = $getSelection()
   125→          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   126→            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
   127→          }
   128→        }
   129→      })
   130→      closeMenu()
   131→      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
   132→    },
   133→    [editor],
   134→  )
   135→
   136→  return (
   137→    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
   138→      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
   139→      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
   140→      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
   141→      options={filteredItems}
   142→      menuRenderFn={(
   143→        anchorElementRef,
   144→        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
   145→      ) => {
   146→        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
   147→          return null
   148→        }
   149→        return (
   150→          <FloatingSlashMenu anchorElementRef={anchorElementRef}>
   151→            <SlashMenuList
   152→              options={filteredItems}
   153→              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
   154→              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
   155→              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
   156→            />
   157→          </FloatingSlashMenu>
   158→        )
   159→      }}
   160→    />
   161→  )
   162→}
   163→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-plugin-slash-menu/src/SlashMenuList.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { SlashMenuItem } from './SlashMenuItem'
     4→import * as css from './styles.css'
     5→
     6→interface SlashMenuListProps {
     7→  options: SlashMenuItem[]
     8→  selectedIndex: number | null
     9→  selectOptionAndCleanUp: (option: SlashMenuItem) => void
    10→  setHighlightedIndex: (index: number) => void
    11→}
    12→
    13→interface SectionGroup {
    14→  label: string
    15→  items: { item: SlashMenuItem; globalIndex: number }[]
    16→}
    17→
    18→function groupBySection(options: SlashMenuItem[]): SectionGroup[] {
    19→  const groups: SectionGroup[] = []
    20→  const seen = new Map<string, SectionGroup>()
    21→
    22→  options.forEach((item, index) => {
    23→    const label = item.section
    24→    let group = seen.get(label)
    25→    if (!group) {
    26→      group = { label, items: [] }
    27→      seen.set(label, group)
    28→      groups.push(group)
    29→    }
    30→    group.items.push({ item, globalIndex: index })
    31→  })
    32→
    33→  return groups
    34→}
    35→
    36→export function SlashMenuList({
    37→  options,
    38→  selectedIndex,
    39→  selectOptionAndCleanUp,
    40→  setHighlightedIndex,
    41→}: SlashMenuListProps) {
    42→  const sections = useMemo(() => groupBySection(options), [options])
    43→
    44→  if (options.length === 0) {
    45→    return (
    46→      <div className={css.slashMenu}>
    47→        <div className={css.slashMenuEmpty}>No matching commands</div>
    48→      </div>
    49→    )
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  return (
    53→    <ul className={css.slashMenu} role="listbox">
    54→      {sections.map((section) => (
    55→        <li key={section.label} role="presentation">
    56→          <div className={css.slashMenuSection}>{section.label}</div>
    57→          <ul style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0 }} role="group">
    58→            {section.items.map(({ item, globalIndex }) => (
    59→              <li
    60→                key={item.key}
    61→                className={css.slashMenuItem}
    62→                role="option"
    63→                aria-selected={globalIndex === selectedIndex}
    64→                onClick={() => selectOptionAndCleanUp(item)}
    65→                onMouseEnter={() => setHighlightedIndex(globalIndex)}
    66→                ref={item.setRefElement}
    67→                tabIndex={-1}
    68→              >
    69→                <span className={css.slashMenuItemIcon}>{item.icon}</span>
    70→                <span className={css.slashMenuItemText}>
    71→                  <span className={css.slashMenuItemTitle}>{item.title}</span>
    72→                  {item.description && (
    73→                    <span className={css.slashMenuItemDescription}>
    74→                      {item.description}
    75→                    </span>
    76→                  )}
    77→                </span>
    78→              </li>
    79→            ))}
    80→          </ul>
    81→        </li>
    82→      ))}
    83→    </ul>
    84→  )
    85→}
    86→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import {
  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
import {
  autoUpdate,
  flip,
  offset,
  shift,
  useFloating,
} from '@floating-ui/react-dom'
import type { LexicalEditor, TextNode } from 'lexical'
import { $getSelection, $isRangeSelection } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'

import { getBuiltinItems } from './builtinItems'
import type { SlashMenuItem } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuItem as SlashMenuItemClass } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuList } from './SlashMenuList'

export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {
  items?: SlashMenuItem[]
  extraItems?: SlashMenuItem[]
  triggerChar?: string
}

interface SlashMenuItemConfig {
  title: string
  icon?: ReactNode
  description?: string
  keywords?: string[]
  section?: string
  onSelect: (editor: LexicalEditor, queryString: string) => void
}

export function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    if (configs) {
      for (const config of configs) {
        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
      }
    }
  }
  return items
}

function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
  if (!query) return items
  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
  return items.filter((item) => {
    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
  })
}

export function SlashMenuPlugin({
  items,
  extraItems,
  triggerChar = '/',
}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)

  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    if (items) return items
    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
  }, [items, extraItems, editor])

  const filteredItems = useMemo(
    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
    [queryString, allItems],
  )

  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
    minLength: 0,
  })

  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    (
      option: SlashMenuItem,
      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
      closeMenu: () => void,
      matchingString: string,
    ) => {
      editor.update(() => {
        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
          const selection = $getSelection()
          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
          }
        }
      })
      closeMenu()
      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
    },
    [editor],
  )

  const { refs, floatingStyles } = useFloating({
    placement: 'bottom-start',
    middleware: [offset(4), flip({ padding: 8 }), shift({ padding: 8 })],
    whileElementsMounted: autoUpdate,
  })

  const anchorRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null)

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    if (anchorRef.current) {
      refs.setReference(anchorRef.current)
    }
  })

  return (
    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
      options={filteredItems}
      menuRenderFn={(
        anchorElementRef,
        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
      ) => {
        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
          return null
        }
        anchorRef.current = anchorElementRef.current
        return createPortal(
          <PortalThemeWrapper>
            <div ref={refs.setFloating} style={floatingStyles}>
              <SlashMenuList
                options={filteredItems}
                selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
                selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
                setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
              />
            </div>
          </PortalThemeWrapper>,
          document.body,
        )
      }}
    />
  )
}

```
